About

WHO
I AM

I'm a Product Designer with a passion for turning gnarly, complex problems into clean, meaningful user experiences that actually move the needle.

I've shipped work across B2B SaaS at ConnectWise, consumer mobile, and marketplace platforms — collaborating with PMs, engineers, and stakeholders to deliver from concept to launch.

Philosophy

DESIGN WITH EMPATHY.
SHIP WITH CLARITY.

Good work shows — in the details, in the edge cases, and in how it feels to use.
